mapper.sql: id, pay_order_no, user_id, amount_fen, points_granted, status, notify_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT status FROM recharge_order WHERE pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO recharge_order (pay_order_no, user_id, amount_fen, points_granted, status, notify_count) VALUES (#{payOrderNo}, #{userId}, #{amountFen}, #{pointsGranted}, 'PENDING', 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_order SET status = 'SUCCESS', notify_count = notify_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} AND deleted_at IS NULL
